instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that displays profile fields `bio`, `website`, and `location`, using "Not provided" for each missing or blank string. Escape all user-provided values when present.
code:
<#-- Model: bio, website, location: strings (optional) -->
<dl class="profile">
  <dt>Bio</dt>
  <dd><#if bio?has_content>${bio?html}<#else>Not provided</#if></dd>
  <dt>Website</dt>
  <dd><#if website?has_content>${website?html}<#else>Not provided</#if></dd>
  <dt>Location</dt>
  <dd><#if location?has_content>${location?html}<#else>Not provided</#if></dd>
</dl>
